global_description: A medium-sized bird with a slender, elongated body and a long tail. It has a predominantly brown plumage with streaked patterns, a slightly curved bill, and bright yellow eyes. The wings are rounded and the legs are long and slender.

part_details.plumage: Brown with dark streaks, providing a camouflaged appearance.
part_details.tail: Long and slightly fan-shaped, brown with subtle streaks.
part_details.bill: Slightly curved, slender, and pointed, dark in color.
part_details.wings: Rounded, brown with streaks, aiding in agile flight.

spatial_relations: The long tail extends from the rear of the body.
The slightly curved bill is positioned at the front of the head.
The bright yellow eyes are located on either side of the head.
The rounded wings are attached to the sides of the body.
